generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
// No acting components defined

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measured by the motor controller, streams data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position, streams data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder measuring angular position behind gearbox, streams data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance AllPhysicalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

// C5: Data (trace and aggregated)
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current draw of the permanent magnet synchronous motor, measured in amperes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position of the motor, measured in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position of the gearbox output, measured in degrees"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor torque derived from current and position, measured in Nm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity derived from position, measured in rad/s"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox torque derived from gearbox position, measured in Nm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity derived from position, measured in rad/s"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance OverallSystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated system torque combining motor and gearbox torque, measured in Nm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregator
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]
instance OverallSystemVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated system velocity combining motor and gearbox angular velocity, measured in rad/s"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregator
    DTDFVocab:fromData AllPhysicalDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLEngineeringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component–connector model of the first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutor
]
instance SimulinkMotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable simulating the permanent magnet synchronous motor with Coulomb–Viscous and Stribeck friction sub‑models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutor
]
instance SimulinkGearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable simulating the gearwheel with Dahl and LuGre friction sub‑models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutor
]
instance SimulinkGearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable simulating the cycloidal gearbox with combined friction sub‑models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutor
]
instance CalculationTorqueModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical torque prediction model exported from the Simulink motor simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
]
instance CalculationVelocityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical angular velocity prediction model exported from the Simulink gear simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessor
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTDataConsumer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT consumer that ingests real‑time sensor streams for the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, SimulationExecutionService
]
instance SimulinkExecutor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink executor that runs the motor, gearwheel, and gearbox simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]
instance DataProcessor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component that consumes sensor data, performs calculations, and updates friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ComparativeAnalysisService
]
instance DataAggregator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Aggregation enabler that compiles processed data traces for analysis and storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]
instance DashboardUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard enabler for displaying torque, velocity, and insight feeds"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]
instance FrictionModelUpdater : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Updater that writes updated friction parameters back to the simulators and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous friction identification service combining white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight, ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]
instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes motor and gearbox behavior simulations in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComparativeAnalysisInsight
]
instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that aggregates and abstracts data traces for downstream analysis"
]
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that drives real‑time dashboards for monitoring performance and maintenance"
]
instance ComparativeAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that compares simulated torque/velocity with measured signals for insight generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updated friction model parameters derived from continuous identification"
]
instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight predicting potential wear and maintenance needs based on friction trends"
]
instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight identifying performance improvements by comparing simulation and measurement data"
]
instance ComparativeAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing comparative analysis between simulated and measured torque/velocity"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to update the motor control algorithm with new friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance MaintenanceDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action for operators to schedule maintenance based on maintenance forecasts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment (digital twin system container)
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder,
        AllPhysicalDataTransmitted,
        SysMLEngineeringModel, SimulinkMotorSimulationModel,
        SimulinkGearwheelSimulationModel, SimulinkGearboxSimulationModel,
        CalculationTorqueModel, CalculationVelocityModel,
        DataProcessor, DataAggregator,
        DashboardUI, FrictionModelUpdater,
        MQTTDataConsumer, SimulinkExecutor,
        FrictionIdentificationService, SimulationExecutionService,
        DataAggregationService, RealTimeDashboardService,
        ComparativeAnalysisService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time streaming and continuous updating: sensor data is received at the sampling rate of the robot (typically several kHz for motor current, tens of Hz for encoder positions) and processed immediately; friction model updates occur online during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An orchestrated set comprising the physical asset (robot), its engineering model, the AAS, sensor data streams via MQTT, the processing component executing data‑calculation and simulation models, and a visualization dashboard; all components are linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design – structural SysML model of the first axis; manufacturing – acquisition of sensor data and default motor/gear parameters from the manufacturer; operation – live data streaming, continuous model refinement and friction identification; validation – comparison between simulated and measured data and updating of control parameters."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity achieved through embedding physics‑based white‑box models alongside black‑box models trained on measured data; validity is ensured by traceability of each data trace to its source and by continuous comparison of simulated results with measured torque and velocity; uncertainties arise from sensor noise and model parameter variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow; Asset Administration Shells act as structural interfaces; no explicit mention of additional protocols such as OPC UA."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Modeling follows SysML and Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards; MBSE practices (RFLP, OOSEM) are referenced; simulation uses Simulink following MATLAB engineering standards."
]
